name: 29 Groups
templateInstructions:
[auto_div_header] Edit only these text nodes:
    .pi-badge -> value of ACTIVE PI field, for example PI 28
    .header-title -> always the value of Roadmap Initiative Group field verbatim
    .header-stat-value (1st) -> Total Effort formatted with comma
    .header-stat-value (2nd) -> Initiative Count as integer
    .header-stat-value (3rd) -> Feature Count as integer

[auto_div_initiatives_table] Keep the table structure intact.
      Update the initiative rows and cell text only.
      Do not change the header labels, sorting attributes, or column order.
      Priority badge colors must strictly follow the template palette — do not introduce any other colors:
        P1 → background:#FF6359  (coral/red)
        P2 → background:#F0A500  (amber)
        P3 → background:#CCCCCC  (light gray, color:white)
        N/A → background:transparent; border:1px solid #CCCCCC; color:#888  (use class prio-na)

[div] Keep the two value cards and their structure intact.
      Update only the text content inside the cards.

[auto_div_business_value] Keep the Business Value card structure intact.
        Update only the bullet text.

[auto_div_market_relevance] Keep the Market Relevance card structure intact.
        Update only the bullet text.

selections.exampleHtml:
PI 28
Feature Catalog
Core Revenue Management Capabilities
Roadmap Initiative Group
23,200
Total Hours
10
Initiatives
35
Features

Initiative Status Features Priority Effort
Registration
Party identifiers, org hierarchy, search enhancements
 In Progress 14 P1 11,866h
Taxpayer Accounting
General ledger core, reconciliation & balance management
 In Analysis 9 P1 8,064h
Returns Processing
Filing workflows, validation rules, submission tracking & acknowledgements
 In Analysis 7 P1 4,320h
Payment Processing
Multi-channel payments, allocation rules & reconciliation engine
 In Analysis 6 P1 3,200h
Billing & Assessments
Instalment plans, assessment automation, billing cycles
 In Progress 6 P2 2,880h
Reporting & Analytics
Management dashboards, statutory reports, KPI tracking & exports
 In Progress 3 P2 1,760h
Penalty & Interest
Interest calculation, credit unallocated payment segments
 To Do 4 N/A TBD
Tax Accounts
Tax account setup, configurable thresholds, notifications
 To Do 2 P1 TBD
Debt Management
Debt recovery workflows, write-off management, enforcement actions
 To Do 5 P2 TBD
Audit & Compliance
Case management, audit trail logging, compliance monitoring & alerts
 To Do 4 P3 TBD
Business Value
Operational impact & delivery enablement
  • End-to-end taxpayer lifecycle management from registration through accounting and penalty enforcement
  • Automated billing, assessments & penalty calculations reduce manual caseworker effort across all tax types
  • Directly accelerates Greek project delivery and enables rapid reuse across future jurisdictions
Market Relevance
Strategic positioning & pipeline dependency
  • Core dependency for all current and pipeline Solon Tax implementations across multiple jurisdictions
  • Strengthens competitive position as a full-featured tax revenue management platform in active tenders
  • Platform completeness is a prerequisite condition cited in new-market RFP evaluation criteria

PERFORMANCE EFFICIENCY
Performance improvements in tasks assignment, CI/CD flow optimization
Waiting Analysis Approval2P1552h

To Do1P314h

Under Analysis8P18,103h

PD Documentation updates/enhancements
To Do1N/An/a
Business Value
Operational impact & delivery enablement
  • Ensures platform accessibility compliance and reduces operational risk through improved security and observability
  • Enhances maintainability and developer experience, accelerating feature delivery and reducing technical debt
  • Strengthens system reliability and performance, directly improving user satisfaction and operational efficiency
Market Relevance
Strategic positioning & pipeline dependency
  • Non-functional requirements are critical differentiators in RFP evaluations and customer satisfaction assessments
  • Security, accessibility, and performance capabilities are mandatory compliance criteria for government and enterprise deployments
  • Improved maintainability and automation reduce total cost of ownership, strengthening competitive positioning in price-sensitive markets
","auto_div_slide_footer":"Solon Tax Product Roadmap 2026Netcompany"},{"auto_div_header":"

Total Hours
2
Initiatives
2
Features
","auto_div_body":"
InitiativeStatusFeaturesPriorityEffort
AEOI, VIDA & OTHER DATA EXCHANGE
Vida PoC - Flow and example integrations
To Do1P3240h
AEOI, VIDA & OTHER DATA STORAGE
Data Storage - National DB - Central repository for all issued and received e-invoices
To Do1P3400h
Business Value
Operational impact & delivery enablement
  • Enables seamless cross-border e-invoice flow with EN 16931 compliance and VIES 2.0 integration for EU data exchange
  • Centralizes invoice data storage with immutable WORM architecture, ensuring audit-ready compliance with GDPR and national tax law
  • Automates VAT reconciliation, fraud detection, and real-time risk analytics across domestic and cross-border transactions
Market Relevance
Strategic positioning & pipeline dependency
  • Positions Solon Tax as a leader in EU digital tax reporting and e-invoicing standardization across member states
  • Supports revenue authority modernization initiatives (mydata, SDI, SII) and strengthens competitive advantage in European tenders
  • Enables rapid deployment of real-time reporting infrastructure critical for next-generation tax compliance platforms
","auto_div_slide_footer":"Solon Tax Product Roadmap 2026Netcompany"},{"auto_div_header":"

InitiativeStatusFeaturesPriorityEffort
APPLICATION PROCESSES

CIT

Under Analysis1P314h
PAYE

To Do1P342h

Under Analysis3P136h
SELF SERVICE ACCOUNT OVERVIEW

SELF SERVICE FILING & PAYMENTS
See Filing Obligation Details, Payment Forms, Payment History & Account Overview
Under Analysis7P23,513h
Business Value
Operational impact & delivery enablement
  • Enables four-eye approval workflows and double attestation for high-risk transactions across tax processes
  • Provides complete self-service filing and payment capabilities for taxpayers across multiple tax types (CIT, PIT, PAYE)
  • Directly accelerates Greek UBM project delivery and establishes reusable reference implementations for future jurisdictions
Market Relevance
Strategic positioning & pipeline dependency
  • Reference implementations demonstrate platform capability across multiple tax types and use cases in active tenders
  • Four-eye principle and compliance workflows address critical regulatory requirements in European tax administrations
  • Self-service filing and payment capabilities are baseline expectations in modern tax authority RFP evaluations
